# Discover Companions

Recommend companion tools for the current project, current platform, and user goal.

## Procedure

scope

- Determine the user goal and current platform.
- Confirm whether the user only wants recommendations or also wants to save selections or refresh the runtime snapshot.
- Treat companion recommendations as candidates, not proof that any external capability is available.

inspect-context

- Read `packages/wonder-extend/catalog/companions.json`.
- Read project context that affects companion fit.
- Read `.wonder/extend/companions.json` when it exists.
- Read `.wonder/extend/capabilities.json` only as evidence that a capability has already been detected.
- Continue with conservative assumptions when optional context is unavailable.

recommend

- Rank catalog candidates by user goal, current platform fit, and project context.
- Explain why each recommended companion may help.
- Mark each recommendation as either recommended only or already detected as available.
- Include the next user action needed before any external capability can be used.

optionally-save

- Write `.wonder/extend/companions.json` only when the user asks to save selections or refresh the snapshot.
- Write `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/recommendation-context.md`.
- Write `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/companion-recommendations.json`.
- Write `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/selection-changes.json`.
- Write `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/artifacts.json`.
- Do not set availability or installation fields in saved companion selections.

report

- Write `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/report.md` for state-changing discovery.
- Summarize recommended companions, relevance, current platform fit, availability evidence, assumptions, and next actions.
- If the catalog is missing or invalid, report that recommendations cannot be produced reliably.
- If multiple candidates fit equally well, present the tradeoffs instead of choosing silently.

Do not install external tools.
Do not configure integrations.
Do not detect actual capability availability.
Do not store secrets.
Do not create `.wonder/reports/extend-latest.json`.
Do not make other Wonder plugins depend on companion recommendations.
